---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about how the template works or how to adapt it
title: "[Q] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do

Describe the situation and what you're trying to achieve.

## What have you tried

If applicable, what did you try that didn't work?

## What you read

Have you already checked:

- [ ] [`README.md`](../README.md)
- [ ] [`LEARN.md`](../LEARN.md) - the guided course
- [ ] [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Relevant folder README (e.g., `.claude/README.md`, `docs/README.md`)

## Context

- Are you using the template on an existing (brownfield) project or a new one?
- Which AI tools are you using (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini)?
- Anything specific to your setup that would help answer?

## Additional info

Screenshots, code snippets, or links if useful.
